meta.title: Shiftly — Smarter Shifts. Better Balance.
meta.description: Shiftly is the intelligent shift calendar for shift workers worldwide. Auto-fill 10 years of shifts in one tap, track leave, estimate pay, and never miss a shift again. On the App Store.

hero.badge: Now live on the App Store · iOS 16+
hero.sub: The intelligent shift calendar built for rotating workers worldwide. Auto-fill years of schedules in one tap, track leave, estimate pay, and never miss a shift again.

features.sub: Every feature designed around how shift workers actually live — from auto-scheduling to fatigue tracking.

items.title: Intelligent Shift Calendar
items.desc: Day, Night, Off — colour-coded across your entire month. Tap any day to see start time, end time, and duration. Override or lock any date without disrupting the rest of your pattern.

items.title: Shift Planner
items.desc: Choose a rotation pattern and auto-fill up to 10 years in one tap. A live 30-day colour preview shows exactly how your shifts will look before you generate. Supports 2D·2N·4OFF, 3D·3N·3OFF, 4D·4OFF, and fully custom patterns.

items.title: Smart Shift Alarms
items.desc: Pick a date range and Shiftly finds every upcoming shift and creates iOS system alarms automatically. Separate alarm times for Day shifts and Night shifts — set them once, never touch them again.

items.title: Payroll Estimator
items.desc: See your estimated gross pay before payday. Shiftly automatically calculates base pay, night differential, weekend premiums, and overtime — all broken down from your actual shift schedule.

items.title: Fatigue Guardian
items.desc: AI-powered sleep and fatigue analysis based on your real shift pattern. Monitors average sleep, consecutive night runs, and sleep debt — then gives you personalised recommendations before burnout hits.

items.title: Leave & Availability
items.desc: Track Annual Leave, Comp Off, and Standby duties with a full balance overview for the year. Log swap requests, override rotations, and keep everything in one place.

items.title: Custom Rotation Patterns
items.desc: Every rotation is different. Build a fully custom pattern with any combination of Day, Night, Noon, and Off segments in any sequence. Save multiple patterns and switch between them instantly.

why.sub: Shift work disrupts sleep, health, and planning. Shiftly gives you the tools to stay ahead.

cards.title: Fill 10 years in seconds
cards.desc: Choose your rotation pattern once. Shiftly auto-fills your entire calendar — no manual entry, ever.

cards.title: Never miss a shift alarm
cards.desc: One tap creates perfectly timed alarms for every upcoming shift. Fully automatic, always accurate.

cards.title: Understand your wellbeing
cards.desc: The Fatigue Guardian analyses your pattern and gives you personalised recommendations before burnout hits.

cards.title: Your data stays with you
cards.desc: All data is stored locally on your device. Shiftly never collects, shares, or monetises your schedule.

about.p1: Shiftly was created by someone with 25 years of experience in 24/7 airport operations — the kind of environment where shift timing is critical and fatigue has real consequences.
about.p2: Every feature in Shiftly solves a problem we personally experienced: forgetting a shift, miscalculating leave, or not knowing how tired we actually were. This is software built with empathy.

pricing.sub: No subscriptions. No tiers. No recurring charges. While competitors charge $3–8/month, Shiftly is yours for life for a single $3.99 payment.
pricing.priceNote: One-time payment · No subscription · Own it forever
features: Shift Planner — auto-fill up to 10 years
pricing.note: Secure purchase through Apple · iPhone & iPad · iOS 16+

items.text: “Finally an app that understands rotating shifts. The auto-fill saved me hours every month. The alarm system is absolutely brilliant — I haven't missed a shift since.”
items.name: K. A.

items.text: “The fatigue scoring is a game-changer. I used to push through warning signs — now I can see objectively when I need to rest. My health has genuinely improved.”
items.name: S. R.

items.text: “The payroll estimator alone is worth the price. I can now plan my finances based on real shift numbers instead of guessing. Incredibly well thought out.”
items.name: M. C.

items.a: Shiftly is available on iOS — iPhone and iPad — requiring iOS 16 or later. An Android version (ShiftlyGrid) is in development.

items.q: Is there a subscription or recurring fee?
items.a: No — Shiftly is a one-time purchase of $3.99. You get full access to every feature and every future update, forever. No subscription, no renewals, ever.

items.q: How do the Smart Alarms work?
items.a: Choose a date range and Shiftly finds all your upcoming shifts and creates iOS system alarms for each one automatically. You can set separate alarm times for Day shifts and Night shifts, and Shiftly handles the rest.

items.q: Is my data stored in the cloud?
items.a: No. All your shift data is stored locally on your device. ShiftlyWork does not collect, transmit, or share any of your personal or schedule data. Your privacy is fundamental to how Shiftly is designed.

items.q: Can I create a custom shift pattern?
items.a: Absolutely. In addition to built-in patterns (2D·2N·4OFF, 3D·3N·3OFF, 4D·4OFF, 2D·2Noon·2N·2OFF), you can create fully custom rotations with any combination of Day, Night, Noon, and Off segments in any sequence.

items.q: Can I export or print my calendar?
items.a: Yes. Shiftly lets you export your calendar as a PDF or print it directly from the app via AirPrint. Great for sharing with family or keeping a paper record.
ShiftlyGrid for Android is currently in development. Join the waitlist by emailing support@shiftlywork.com and we'll notify you when it's available.
